# OKF test fixtures

These are upstream sample bundles for the Open Knowledge Format (OKF) ingestion adapter, vendored byte-exact from [GoogleCloudPlatform/knowledge-catalog](https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/knowledge-catalog) (Apache-2.0) at pinned commit `ee67a5ca27044ebe7c38385f5b6cffc2305a9c1a`, fetched 2026-07-08. Two bundles are included from upstream `okf/bundles/`: `crypto_bitcoin/` (Bitcoin blockchain public dataset) and `ga4/` (GA4 Merchandise Store obfuscated ecommerce sample); `MANIFEST.json` records the exact per-bundle file lists that tests assert against, and `SPEC-ee67a5ca.md` is the vendored OKF spec snapshot at the same commit. The upstream `stackoverflow` bundle was license-scanned and deliberately excluded: its `references/*.md` files (e.g. `post_history_type_ids.md`, `vote_types.md`) embed near-verbatim CC BY-SA-licensed text from the community answer at meta.stackexchange.com/questions/2677, so it cannot be redistributed here under plain Apache-2.0 attribution (see `NOTICE`).
